narration_text: Now we'll see some examples of internet-connected devices that might seem unusual at first, but are actually quite interesting. Look at the images on the slide, notice the variety of devices, from internet phones to IP picture frames, and even a device called Tweet-a-watt that monitors energy use. Take a closer look at the images, you'll see a mix of everyday objects and specialized devices, all connected to the internet in some way. I want you to focus on how these devices are all part of a larger trend towards greater connectivity. As we explore these examples, let's think about the implications of this trend, and how it's changing the way we live and interact with technology, which will lead us to our next topic.
